mapper.insert: insert into file_import_line_record (id, tenant_id, file_record_id, process_status, process_message, create_time, creator_id, creator, update_time, updator_id, updator, deleted, line_detail) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{tenantId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{fileRecordId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{processStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{processMessage,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{creatorId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{creator,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updatorId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updator,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{deleted,jdbcType=BIT}, #{lineDetail,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR})

insert into file_import_line_record
id,
tenant_id,
file_record_id,
process_status,
process_message,
create_time,
creator_id,
creator,
update_time,
updator_id,
updator,
deleted,
line_detail,

insert into file_import_line_record (tenant_id, file_record_id, process_status, process_message, create_time, creator_id, creator, line_detail) values
(#{item.tenantId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.fileRecordId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.processStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.processMessage,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.creatorId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.creator,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.lineDetail,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR})
